overview.description: The iShares iBonds 2032 Term High Yield and Income ETF (IBHL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of USD-denominated, high yield and BBB-rated corporate bonds maturing in 2032. The fund will terminate in December 2032. IBHL was launched on Mar 25, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Bloomberg 2032 Term High Yield and Income Index
